import React,{useState}from"react";import{BrowserRouter as Router}from"react-router-dom";import{AuthProvider,useAuth}from"./context/AuthContext";import Navbar from"./components/layout/Navbar";import Footer from"./components/layout/Footer";import AppBackground from"./components/ui/AppBackground";import LoginPage from"./components/auth/LoginPage";import RegisterPage from"./components/auth/RegisterPage";import LandingPage from"./pages/LandingPage";import Dashboard from"./pages/Dashboard";import AuditsPage from"./pages/AuditsPage";import AITestsPage from"./pages/AITestsPage";import MonitoringPage from"./pages/MonitoringPage";import ReportsPage from"./pages/ReportsPage";import AdvancedAuditPage from"./pages/AdvancedAuditPage";import SimulatorPage from"./pages/SimulatorPage";import CompetitorPage from"./pages/CompetitorPage";import ExecutiveSummaryPage from"./pages/ExecutiveSummaryPage";import ProfilePage from"./pages/ProfilePage";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AppContent(){const{user,loading}=useAuth();const[view,setView]=useState("landing");const[activePage,setActivePage]=useState("dashboard");if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"min-h-screen bg-[#050508] flex items-center justify-center","data-testid":"loading-screen",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex flex-col items-center gap-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"w-8 h-8 border-2 border-blue-500/30 border-t-blue-500 rounded-full animate-spin"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-xs text-gray-500 font-medium",children:"Loading"})]})});}// Authenticated: show dashboard
if(user){const renderPage=()=>{switch(activePage){case"dashboard":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Dashboard,{onNavigate:setActivePage});case"audits":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuditsPage,{});case"ai-tests":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AITestsPage,{});case"monitor":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MonitoringPage,{});case"changes":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(MonitoringPage,{});case"reports":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ReportsPage,{});case"advanced":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AdvancedAuditPage,{});case"simulator":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SimulatorPage,{});case"compare":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CompetitorPage,{});case"executive":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ExecutiveSummaryPage,{});case"profile":return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ProfilePage,{});default:return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Dashboard,{onNavigate:setActivePage});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"min-h-screen text-white antialiased",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AppBackground,{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{activePage:activePage,onNavigate:setActivePage}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("main",{className:"relative z-10 pt-24 pb-12 px-4 lg:px-0",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"max-w-6xl mx-auto",children:renderPage()})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Footer,{onNavigate:setActivePage})]});}// Unauthenticated
if(view==="login"){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LoginPage,{onSwitch:()=>setView("register")});}if(view==="register"){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(RegisterPage,{onSwitch:()=>setView("login")});}// Landing
return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"min-h-screen text-white antialiased",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navbar,{isLanding:true,onGetStarted:()=>setView("login")}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(LandingPage,{onGetStarted:()=>setView("register")}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Footer,{})]});}function App(){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Router,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthProvider,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AppContent,{})})});}export default App;
